  • Uses of SemanticVariant in io.forja.tokens

    Methods in io.forja.tokens that return SemanticVariant
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static SemanticVariant
    SemanticVariant.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
    static SemanticVariant[]
    SemanticVariant.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
    Methods in io.forja.tokens with parameters of type SemanticVariant
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    SemanticVariant.applyTo(javafx.scene.Node node, SemanticVariant active)
    Toggles the active variant on node and clears every other semantic variant pseudo-class.
